protocol.name: LENGEN - Lentiviral Generation, Packaging and Transduction

reagents.name: HEK293T_cells
reagents.role: Producer cell line for lentiviral packaging

reagents.name: TargetCells
reagents.role: Breast cancer cells for transduction (MCF-7 or T47DKB-Luc)

steps.name: Seed HEK293T Producer Cells
steps.description: Dispense HEK293T cells with Pluronics F-127 onto the 1.6 mm hydrophilic production site via passive dispensing.

steps.name: Prepare Lipofectamine-DNA Mastermix
steps.description: Co-transfection mastermix containing all three plasmids combined with Lipofectamine 3000 and P3000 in Opti-MEM, then supplemented with Pluronics F-127 for DMF actuation.
mixing_order: Combine plasmid pool with lipofection reagents (5s)

steps.name: Transfect HEK293T Cells
steps.description: Actuate lipofectamine mastermix onto seeded HEK293T cells using the four-prong electrode production area. Circulate droplet for uniform mixing to replicate reverse transfection.

steps.name: Lentiviral Particle Production
steps.description: Incubate transfected HEK293T cells to allow lentiviral particle accumulation in the supernatant.

steps.name: Seed Target Cells
steps.description: Dispense target breast cancer cells with Pluronics F-127 onto six 1.2 mm transduction sites via highway track passive dispensing.

steps.name: Serial Dilution of Viral Supernatant
steps.description: Generate four serial dilutions of the lentiviral supernatant using DMEM + polybrene as diluent via highway track electrode actuation.

steps.name: Transduce Target Cells
steps.description: Deliver each dilution to a separate target cell site via the highway track electrodes. Flip device upside down for overnight incubation to maximize contact.

steps.name: mCherry Fluorescence Detection and Viral Titer Calculation
steps.description: Image hydrophilic spots using fluorescence microscopy. Count mCherry-positive cells and calculate viral titer using the formula below.
steps.titer_formula: TU/mL = (# cells transduced x % fluorescent x dilution factor) / transduction volume (mL)
imaging_pipeline: Calculate % fluorescence = mCherry+ / Hoechst nuclei x 100

steps.name: shRNA Knockdown Assay (Optional)
steps.description: Replace transfer plasmid with MISSION shRNA plasmid targeting ESR1. Repeat Steps 2-8. Retrieve transduced cells by trypsinization and culture for 7 days with puromycin selection before qRT-PCR.

cell_harvest.wash: 5 uL PBS aspirated with Pasteur pipette
cell_harvest.detachment: 2 uL Trypsin-EDTA (0.25% w/v), 2 min at 37C with 5% CO2
cell_harvest.pooling: 2 microwells per dilution resuspended in 10 uL complete medium
cell_harvest.expansion: 96-well plate, 100 uL complete medium per well

steps.name: CRISPR-Cas9 Knockout Assay (Optional)
steps.description: Replace transfer plasmid with pLentiCRISPR-mCherry-NeoRv2 (LCMNv2) all-in-one Cas9 + sgRNA plasmid. Repeat Steps 2-8. Retrieve cells and perform genomic cleavage assay to confirm knockout.

cell_harvest.wash: 5 uL PBS aspirated with Pasteur pipette
cell_harvest.detachment: 2 uL Trypsin-EDTA (0.25% w/v), 2 min at 37C with 5% CO2
cell_harvest.pooling: 2 microwells per dilution resuspended in 10 uL complete medium
cell_harvest.expansion: 96-well plate, 100 uL complete medium per well
